scripts.ci:guard: python tools/run_node.py tools/check_module_boundaries.mjs && python tools/run_node.py tools/check_repo_hygiene.mjs
scripts.test: python tools/run_node.py --test tests/tooling/repo_contracts.test.mjs tests/tooling/entry_boundary.test.mjs tests/tooling/runtime_config.test.mjs tests/tooling/asset_bundle_loader.test.mjs tests/tooling/asset_preprocess.test.mjs
scripts.build:site: python tools/build_demo_bundle.py && python tools/build_wasm_runtime.py && python tools/export_site.py
scripts.parity:native: python tools/run_python.py tools/mhr_native_harness.py --manifest local_tools/official_bundle/manifest.json --oracle-root local_tools/mhr_parity/ref_py --out local_tools/mhr_parity/ref_native --rebuild
